idea_ref: [P2.PE] Synthesize pe (propaganda vs. everything) instances via LLM API
hypothesis: pe is chronically underrepresented (F1≈0.17). Targeted synthetic generation of pe-like examples should improve recall. Uses OpenRouter LLM API to generate propaganda-themed fallacious texts.
gate: ONLY proceed if exp_0082 NLI pe-F1 < 0.40
